faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about creating a professional email signature.

questions.q: How do I add the signature to Gmail?
questions.a: Click the 'Copy Signature' button, then open Gmail Settings > General > Signature. Paste the signature into the box and save changes.
Yes! You can create and use your signature for free. No account or subscription required.

questions.q: Can I use my own company logo?
questions.a: Yes, you can upload any image and it will be auto-optimized for your signature.

seo.title: Why you need a Professional Email Signature
seo.p1: An email signature is more than just your name; it is your digital business card. In a world of digital noise, a clean, professional signature establishes trust and authority instantly. Our generator helps you create high-fidelity HTML signatures that work seamlessly across all platforms.
seo.p2: Whether you are a freelancer, a small business owner, or a corporate executive, your email communication should reflect your professional standards. Using a generic 'Sent from my iPhone' signature misses a critical branding opportunity. With our free tool, you can unify your social links, website, and contact information into a single, cohesive design.
seo.p3: Our layouts are built using cross-client compatible HTML tables, ensuring that your branding looks exactly as intended, whether viewed on a 4K desktop monitor or a smartphone screen. We prioritize performance and privacy, making this the most efficient tool for creating your professional digital identity.
